title: Penalty for violation of provisions of this Part
doc_html:
§406.  Penalty for violation of provisions of this Part

Whoever violates any provision of this Part shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not more than six months, or both.
doc_text:
§406.  Penalty for violation of provisions of this Part
Whoever violates any provision of this Part shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned not more than six months, or both.
